# HR Management

Online Course

Bring your ambitious career goals within reach. In this online HR management course, you will gain the essential skills and knowledge to excel and advance as an HR manager or future CHRO. You will learn what is needed to lead with impact, earn trust, and advance your career with purpose. Whether you’re stepping into management or working toward a future HR leadership role, this is the training in HR management you need to overcome common challenges on your way to the top.

This course is only available as part of the HR Manager Certificate Program or as part of Full Academy Access.

Trusted by 85,000+ 
HR professionals

## Learning Objectives

Understand the different roles HR leaders play and how you can succeed in each

Manage culture and change with clarity and resilience as an HR manager

Lead global and remote Human Resources teams effectively

Develop a leadership mindset to grow your impact and career opportunities

### Why AIHR?

✓ Globally accredited & recognized (SHRM, HRCI, more…)

✓ Join 85,000+ members worldwide

✓ Future-focused and human-centric

✓ All the tools you need to level up your career

Read our 12470 reviews

## Course structure

HR Management

3 modules

• 11 lessons

• 6 hours

Power your Human Resources Management ambitions

If you’re ready to move beyond core HR tasks, this HR management training course will help you future-proof your knowledge and skills and advance your career in HRM. You’ll map your path toward HR management and CHRO-level impact, sharpen the leadership skills needed to thrive, and tackle real challenges HR leaders face, from navigating power dynamics to leading remote and virtual teams effectively.

## FAQs

Need help making the right choice? Speak with an admissions advisor or send them a message.

### Why should I enroll in this Human Resources Management online learning course?

Advancing from a generalist or specialist to a management or leadership position requires a broader set of skills. If you’re ready to climb the ladder, AIHR’s online HR management course helps you bridge the gap between “doing HR” and leading it. You’ll build the core skills HR managers need, like stakeholder management, project management, and leadership presence, while learning how to handle real-world challenges such as paradoxes, competing priorities, and power dynamics. You’ll leave with practical tools you can apply immediately, plus a clearer roadmap for your next career step.

### How can I ensure my HR Management career is future proof?

The best way to stay ahead is to keep learning in a structured, practical way. With HR management training like AIHR’s HR Management online course, you’ll develop the mindset and capabilities you need to stay relevant. This course highlights common pitfalls that hold HR managers back, and helps you understand how factors like your industry and location shape your growth, so you can make smarter choices and keep progressing as HR expectations change.

### What training is required for an HR manager?

There’s no one-size-fits-all path, but effective HR managers typically combine HR expertise with leadership skills. Training through an HRM course supports your development in areas like managing teams, influencing stakeholders, guiding change, and navigating complex workplace challenges, helping you transition into HR management with confidence and credibility.

AIHR’s HR Management course gives you the competencies needed for this transition, and if you want to build broader capability across the full HR manager skill set, the HR Manager Certificate Program provides a structured learning journey.

For those looking to expand their expertise even further, our Full Academy Access gives you everything you need to succeed in HR, including access to this course, all other courses and certificate programs, a library of downloadable templates and resources, exclusive live events, and more.

### What is the best HR management training?

The best HR management training depends on your current experience and what you want to achieve, whether you’re stepping into your first management role or preparing for senior HR leadership. To help you choose, here are a few criteria to consider when selecting a training:

* Leadership-focused content that goes beyond HR fundamentals and prepares you to lead people and initiatives
* Practical frameworks you can apply to real HR challenges and decision-making
* A strategic mindset that helps you align HR priorities with business goals
* Real-world examples and tools to build confidence and accelerate your growth
* A clear development path that supports long-term career progression

AIHR’s **HR Management course** fulfills all these criteria. Get Full Academy Access to unlock this course plus much more!

### How long is an HR management course?

The length of an HR management course depends on the depth of the training and how it’s delivered. Some courses take just a few hours and focus on one topic, while more comprehensive programs can take several weeks as they cover a wider range of leadership and management skills.

For example, AIHR’s HR Management course includes 11 lessons (around 6 hours) and is self-paced, so you can complete it around your schedule. If you’re looking for a longer-term development path, the HR Manager Certificate Program combines multiple courses into a structured learning journey,

### How to become an HR manager?

To become an HR manager, you typically need a strong HR foundation and the leadership skills to guide people, drive initiatives, and partner with the business. Building confidence in decision-making, stakeholder management, and leading through change can help you step into management more smoothly.

Dedicated training in HR management, like AIHR’s HR Management course or the HR Manager Certificate Program, helps you quickly develop the practical techniques and strategies needed to master these skills.

### What if I’d like to get this course for my team?

This HR management training is automatically part of our Team License. With this license, your team will have full access to our constantly updated catalog of certificate programs, courses and mini courses. Plus, you’ll get a library of ready-to-use resources and templates to help your team increase their productivity and efficiency, monthly live events to stay up-to-date with the latest best practices, and much more! Head over to our Team License page for a full overview of the benefits that can help enhance your team’s performance!

### Is there a fixed schedule?

No. This training is 100% online and self-paced! When you learn and how much time you spend each day, week, or month is up to you.

### How long do I have access to the course?

In total, you will have 12 months of access to the member portal, all lessons and learning materials.

### Which languages are the courses conducted in?

All courses are available in English and come with English subtitles.

### Is this online course the right fit for me?

If you’re not sure if this course is the right fit, we are here to help you determine which training best fits your goals and needs! Simply talk to one of our admissions advisors or send them an email at [\](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection).

### Why is this course not sold individually?

To optimize the quality of your learning experience, this course is not available for standalone enrollment and is either available as part of a Certificate Program or included with the Full Academy Access License.
